case_title: OJASCASTRO, LILIAN vs. NGUYEN, THAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OJASCASTRO, LILIAN AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, THAN NGUYEN, DUNG SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-11-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-12-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-24-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-11-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-11-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUL-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-02-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-02-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR AUG-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
